programme.desc: Mental Health Television Network is dedicated to changing the way we understand and address mental health. programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: The Cost of War
programme.desc: S01 E01 World War I Nearly 10 million died in WWI; 21.2 million were wounded, and 7.8 million were taken prisoners or went MIA; $186 billion in direct costs and another $151 billion in indirect costs; it caused the greatest global depression of the 20th century.

programme.title: The Greatest Generals: Douglas MacArthur

programme.title: Hitler's Gold

programme.title: The Cost of War
programme.desc: S01 E02 World War II WWII cost $4.1 trillion in 2011 dollars; up to 70 million people are believed to have died; about two-thirds of them were non-combatants, making it the deadliest conflict ever.

The AVL sends Gru on a mission to capture the perpetrator of a spectacular heist, for who would be better than the world's greatest ex-villain to capture the individual who seeks to usurp his power.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Evolving from single-celled yellow organisms at the dawn of time, Minions live to serve, but find themselves working for a continual series of unsuccessful masters, from T. Rex to Napoleon. Without a master to grovel for, the Minions fall into a deep depression. But one minion, Kevin, has a plan; accompanied by his pals Stuart and Bob, Kevin sets forth to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. Their search leads them to Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever super-villainess.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. The reunited siblings soon find themselves in an uneasy alliance to take down the elusive Balthazar Bratt, a former 1980s child star who seeks revenge against the world.

programme.title: Brannigan
programme.desc: Police Detective Jim Brannigan (John Wayne) is sent from Chicago to London to extradite a wanted American criminal, Ben Larkin (John Vernon). However, Larkin is kidnapped before Brannigan can apprehend him, igniting a manhunt throughout the city. Jennifer (Judy Geeson), a British police officer, is appointed to help Brannigan, who is frequently bewildered by English customs. Brannigan's harsh policing techniques also lead to constant clashes with Cmdr. Swann (Richard Attenborough).

programme.title: The Last Challenge
programme.desc: Hotshot gunfighter Lot McGuire intends to make a name for himself by out-duelling legendary bandit-turned-lawman Marshal Dan Blaine. Before any bullets fly, however, Lot and his intended enemy strike up an unlikely friendship, and Blaine tries to convince the youngster to call off the shootout. Unfortunately, Lot can't be talked out of his quest for glory, and so he guns down a few hostile locals, leaving Blaine no choice but to finally accept the offer for a showdown.

programme.title: Raw Edge
programme.desc: In 1842 lawless Oregon, a gunfighter seeks vengeance when his innocent brother is lynched and his beautiful Indian wife is claimed by the local tyrant.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: Dolores (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon), attractive young surfers in Southern California, are just out for a good time. Their relaxed lifestyle fascinates Professor Sutwell (Bob Cummings), an anthropologist who decides to study the social lives of teens. A series of beach-themed films would follow the blueprint set by this one, which hinges on romantic rivalries, rugged motorcyclists, an attempted crime and plenty of handsome people.

programme.title: Aces High
programme.desc: Maj. Gresham (Malcolm McDowell) is a flying ace who oversees a group of English pilots during World War I. His latest recruit is Lt. Croft (Peter Firth), who happens to have been only a few years behind Gresham at Eton. Croft idolizes Gresham at first, but the image of his hero is tarnished when he learns of Gresham's private habits, especially his predilection for alcohol. It's only after Croft himself has endured the crucible of war that he comes to fully appreciate his commanding officer.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: During World War II, Nazi officer Max Radl devises a plan to kidnap or kill the British prime minister. Approved by German Cmdr. Heinrich Himmler, the scheme moves forward with Col. Kurt Steiner leading the mission, aided by Liam Devlin, an Irishman with a deep hatred of England. As the plan unfolds, it seems to be going well -- until certain events threaten the group's shot at success.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A bloodstain provides Holmes with a clue in the theft of a vital government document.

programme.title: The Health Forum - Mindful Matters
programme.desc: Hosts Olga Villaverde and Christina Nicholson explore cognitive fitness with Dr. Sharon McQuillan and a functional nutritionist.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: A gang of poachers must be stopped as they kill and sell game out of season. Roy figures out who the culprits are and goes undercover to investigate further.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Earp learns of a plot against his life, he avoids speaking at a convention held in the Dodge City Opera House and increases security, but as pressure builds for him to speak, Judge Tobin and Mayor Kelley wonder if Earp can still do his job.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A boy named Benny Burkett attaches himself to Doc Holliday and ends up under the Hollidays' official care after being forced to shoot his abusive father in self-defense; Dr. McCarty delivers news that shakes the newly formed family.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: While Dick Melaney and his Cheyenne wife, Laura, visit Dodge City, a lecherous man confronts Laura, forcing her to shoot him; Laura retreats to find protection with her father, a chieftain who wants Dick to kill the man who assaulted her.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: Dolores (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon), attractive young surfers in Southern California, are just out for a good time. Their relaxed lifestyle fascinates Professor Sutwell (Bob Cummings), an anthropologist who decides to study the social lives of teens. A series of beach-themed films would follow the blueprint set by this one, which hinges on romantic rivalries, rugged motorcyclists, an attempted crime and plenty of handsome people.

programme.title: Aces High
programme.desc: Maj. Gresham (Malcolm McDowell) is a flying ace who oversees a group of English pilots during World War I. His latest recruit is Lt. Croft (Peter Firth), who happens to have been only a few years behind Gresham at Eton. Croft idolizes Gresham at first, but the image of his hero is tarnished when he learns of Gresham's private habits, especially his predilection for alcohol. It's only after Croft himself has endured the crucible of war that he comes to fully appreciate his commanding officer.

programme.title: Ride the High Country
programme.desc: Reduced to transporting gold from a distant mine to a small-town bank, retired lawman Steve Judd (Joel McCrea) recruits friend Gil Westrum (Randolph Scott), who has been performing in a traveling carnival. Unknown to Steve, the restless Gil and a young drifter intend to steal the next gold transport. On the way, the men help Elsa Knudsen (Mariette Hartley) to break free from her zealot father and join her fiancé at the mine, not realizing the consequences that await them all.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: When the Dutch resistance brings in Carla Van Oven (Lana Turner) to spy on the Nazis, Col. Pieter Deventer (Clark Gable) initially suspects she could be a double agent. Van Oven eventually convinces Deventer of her character, and when she is sent into occupied territory, she joins up with a rebel leader known as "The Scarf" (Victor Mature). As the resistance endures severe losses and their missions fail, Deventer starts to wonder whose side Van Oven is fighting on.

programme.title: Ride the High Country
programme.desc: Reduced to transporting gold from a distant mine to a small-town bank, retired lawman Steve Judd (Joel McCrea) recruits friend Gil Westrum (Randolph Scott), who has been performing in a traveling carnival. Unknown to Steve, the restless Gil and a young drifter intend to steal the next gold transport. On the way, the men help Elsa Knudsen (Mariette Hartley) to break free from her zealot father and join her fiancé at the mine, not realizing the consequences that await them all.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A gang coerces a woman into courting Earp to learn information about a gold shipment they plan to rob, but Bat and Mayor Kelley see through the ruse.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes connects a school chum's family ritual with a butler's disappearance.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Daniel Boone
programme.desc: The frontiersman (George O'Brien) leads settlers to Kentucky, where a white renegade (John Carradine) unites tribes against them.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Based on Truman Capote's novel, this is the story of a young woman in New York City who meets a young man when he moves into her apartment building. He is with an older woman who is very wealthy, but he wants to be a writer. She is working as an expensive escort and searching for a rich, older man to marry.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Legendary lawman Bat Masterson (Randolph Scott) is called to rural Kansas to defend farmers from ruthless cattlemen. Joining Masterson in his efforts to clean up a lawless town are a couple of locals: Masterson's old chum Billy Burn and landowner Allen Harper (Robert Ryan). But ranch owner Logan Maury proves to be a more than formidable opponent. He'll stop at nothing, including murder, to turn the farmers' fields into grazing grounds for his cattle.

programme.title: King of the Wild Horses
programme.desc: A mustang stallion runs swiftly to the rescue when the boy who befriended him is endangered.

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin. Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow, the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Based on Truman Capote's novel, this is the story of a young woman in New York City who meets a young man when he moves into her apartment building. He is with an older woman who is very wealthy, but he wants to be a writer. She is working as an expensive escort and searching for a rich, older man to marry.

programme.title: Dirty Dozen: The Next Mission
programme.desc: An Army major (Lee Marvin) can either do hard labor or lead GI convicts into France on a suicide mission.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: The Zachary family live quietly on a cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas. A stranger (Joseph Wiseman) appears and disturbs their bucolic existence by spreading a malicious rumor that their adopted daughter, Rachel (Audrey Hepburn), is a Kiowa Native American. Soon, the Zachary brothers (Audie Murphy, Burt Lancaster) and their mother (Lillian Gish) must defend themselves from both racist whites and vengeful Kiowa.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Eustace Brackenstall's wife tells Holmes she saw a gang murder her savage husband.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With the American Civil War looming, construction of the Pacific railroad is being held up in Kansas, sabotaged by Confederate sympathizers. The government dispatches an Army engineer, John Nelson (Sterling Hayden), to oversee construction, and he initially rubs the wrong way both his proud boss (Barton MacLane) and his boss's feisty daughter (Eve Miller). Eventually, though, both fall for Nelson's charms, and the hero seeks to uncover the Southern rat so he can lead the Union men due west.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ministry - Your Words Have Power with Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Your words hold incredible power; today, Joyce reveals how the things you say can impact your life in profound ways.

programme.title: Word of God Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis and his wife Chrissy are dedicated to winning the lost to Jesus and making disciples of the saved. Their goal is to bring clarity to the Word of God, making it life-applicable to people everywhere.

programme.title: The Catholic Mass
programme.desc: The Heart of the nation Sunday mass brings the beauty and traditions of the Catholic faith.

programme.title: Perry Stone
programme.desc: Religious teachings from Perry Stone.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bat resigns as sheriff and enters into a partnership with local saloon owner Luke Short, who must fight a takeover attempt by two corrupt businessmen; Earp and Bat request a restraining order to stop the men but face resistance from Mayor Kelley.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Tex McKay, a reckless railroad driver, spins tales about his experience and starts fights; when Tex deflects blame for a crash he caused, Earp searches for the truth while Tex's friends go after an innocent man.

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Legendary lawman Bat Masterson (Randolph Scott) is called to rural Kansas to defend farmers from ruthless cattlemen. Joining Masterson in his efforts to clean up a lawless town are a couple of locals: Masterson's old chum Billy Burn and landowner Allen Harper (Robert Ryan). But ranch owner Logan Maury proves to be a more than formidable opponent. He'll stop at nothing, including murder, to turn the farmers' fields into grazing grounds for his cattle.

programme.title: King of the Wild Horses
programme.desc: A mustang stallion runs swiftly to the rescue when the boy who befriended him is endangered.

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin. Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow, the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: Life With Father
programme.desc: In late 19th-century New York City, stockbroker Clarence Day (William Powell) strives to maintain order in his bustling household. Despite his attempts to be the chief authority over his four sons, his wife, Vinnie (Irene Dunne), is the one who truly keeps order in their home, much to Clarence's chagrin. To gain more respect, Clarence reluctantly considers making changes that will benefit everyone, including his own baptism. This slice-of-life comedy was based on a popular Broadway play.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: When beautiful Kay Banks (Elizabeth Taylor) announces her engagement to Buckley Dunstan (Don Taylor), her doting middle-class father, Stan (Spencer Tracy), must contend with a variety of problems, ranging from money issues to wedding planning difficulties. As things get hectic, Stan's wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), tries to be the calm in the center of the storm. At the heart of the comedy, though, is Stan's emotional tie to his little girl, and his realization that she has indeed grown up.

programme.title: Father's Little Dividend
programme.desc: A year after dealing with a surprise engagement in Father of the Bride, Stanley Banks (Spencer Tracy) and his wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), are in for another shock when they find their daughter Kay (Elizabeth Taylor) is now pregnant. Not ready to be a grandfather, Stanley keeps quiet while everyone else fawns over the mother-to-be and bothers her about baby names and nursery decorations. Ironically, his silence makes him the person Kay turns to the most for help, which in turn helps him.

programme.title: The Courtship of Eddie's Father
programme.desc: Realizing that he needs a mother -- and his widower father, Tom (Glenn Ford), needs a wife -- precocious Eddie Corbett (Ron Howard) is determined to get his dad remarried. While Tom dates numerous women, including the uptight aristocrat Rita Behrens (Dina Merrill), nobody seems to be a good fit for Eddie or his father. Soon it becomes apparent that Tom's ideal match may be closer than he thought, as he begins to develop feelings for his lovely neighbor, Elizabeth Marten (Shirley Jones).

programme.title: The Ride to Hangman's Tree
programme.desc: Three Old West outlaws (Jack Lord, James Farentino, Don Galloway) cross paths in California during Wells Fargo stagecoach holdups.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When a newspaper editor drums up anti-Northern sentiment by launching a smear campaign aimed at Earp, the marshal takes a leave of absence to confront a Texas gang working with the editor.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A businessman disappears after his wife catches sight of him in an opium den.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita
programme.desc: Shortly after circus owner Sue Farnum (Dale Evans), her assistant, Gabby (George "Gabby" Hayes), and her late father's ex-partner, Slim Phillips (Addison Richards), accidentally interrupt the filming of a movie starring singing cowboy Roy Rogers (Roy Rogers), Slim is kidnapped. Sue suspects that William Ripley (Grant Withers), a crooked businessman who's trying to steal her circus, is behind the kidnapping. While Sue and Gabby set up a special performance, Roy tracks Slim's kidnappers.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When a scout from the Battle of the Little Big Horn tries to blackmail Gen. Custer's widow, she fears he plans to provide damaging testimony at an upcoming hearing for Maj. Reno; Earp must convince her that her husband was a courageous man.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Unscrupulous businessman Moresby, seeking a way to permanently cripple Earp, convinces a boxing promoter to have his champ beat Earp, but the marshal refuses to take up the challenge until the champ's blatant cheating injures a young man in the ring.

programme.title: The Courtship of Eddie's Father
programme.desc: Realizing that he needs a mother -- and his widower father, Tom (Glenn Ford), needs a wife -- precocious Eddie Corbett (Ron Howard) is determined to get his dad remarried. While Tom dates numerous women, including the uptight aristocrat Rita Behrens (Dina Merrill), nobody seems to be a good fit for Eddie or his father. Soon it becomes apparent that Tom's ideal match may be closer than he thought, as he begins to develop feelings for his lovely neighbor, Elizabeth Marten (Shirley Jones).

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: When beautiful Kay Banks (Elizabeth Taylor) announces her engagement to Buckley Dunstan (Don Taylor), her doting middle-class father, Stan (Spencer Tracy), must contend with a variety of problems, ranging from money issues to wedding planning difficulties. As things get hectic, Stan's wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), tries to be the calm in the center of the storm. At the heart of the comedy, though, is Stan's emotional tie to his little girl, and his realization that she has indeed grown up.

programme.title: Father's Little Dividend
programme.desc: A year after dealing with a surprise engagement in Father of the Bride, Stanley Banks (Spencer Tracy) and his wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), are in for another shock when they find their daughter Kay (Elizabeth Taylor) is now pregnant. Not ready to be a grandfather, Stanley keeps quiet while everyone else fawns over the mother-to-be and bothers her about baby names and nursery decorations. Ironically, his silence makes him the person Kay turns to the most for help, which in turn helps him.

programme.title: The Ride to Hangman's Tree
programme.desc: Three Old West outlaws (Jack Lord, James Farentino, Don Galloway) cross paths in California during Wells Fargo stagecoach holdups.

programme.title: Yellowstone Kelly
programme.desc: Union soldier Maj. Towns (Rhodes Reason) asks fur trapper and Indian scout Luther "Yellowstone" Kelly (Clint Walker) to scout for the Army in Sioux territory. Kelly ventures into the area, only to be taken prisoner by the Sioux. Since Kelly saved the life of Chief Gall (John Russell) years before, the chief promises to free him if Kelly treats wounded Arapaho maiden Wahleeah (Andra Martin). Soon Kelly and the recovered Wahleeah are caught between Towns' soldiers and the vengeful Sioux.

programme.title: Scalplock
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Dale Robertson) wins a railroad in a card game and has to keep it going as people try to take it away from him.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: After saving the life of his royal father's usurper, Pelias (Douglas Wilmer), whom he fails to recognize, Jason (Todd Armstrong) is encouraged by the conniving murderer to begin a quest in search of the Golden Fleece. In doing so, Pelias hopes for Jason's death to thwart the prophecy that he will reclaim the throne. Along the journey, Jason is protected by the goddess Hera (Honor Blackman), and his crew includes Hercules (Nigel Green) and Acastus (Gary Raymond), a saboteur planted by Pelias.

programme.title: Battle of the Bulge
programme.desc: American Lt. Col. Dan Kiley (Henry Fonda), a military intelligence whiz, discovers that the Nazis are planning to attack Allied forces near Belgium. Certain that the exhausted enemy can't muster much force, Gen. Joe Grey (Robert Ryan) isn't convinced by Kiley's findings, and his men pay the price when the German tanks begin their offensive. In the heat of this key World War II battle, Kiley must come up with a plan when it becomes clear that the Nazis are trying to steal fuel from the Allies.

programme.title: Riding the California Trail
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) rescue a señorita.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The seemingly meaningless destruction of six busts of Napoleon intrigues Holmes.

programme.title: Fauda
programme.desc: After retiring from the Israel Defense Force, Doron is working on a vineyard. He gets roped back into active duty, though, upon learning that an enemy who Doron thought his unit had killed is still alive and plans on attending his brother's wedding. Doron rejoins the IDF team with the intention of going under cover at the wedding, but the plan goes awry when the team's cover is blown. That sets into motion a chaotic chain of events and leads IDF into a manhunt to locate and kill the squad's target.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E08 The Many Faces of Charles Siringo Unable to apprehend the train-robbing Smith Brothers, Sheriff Doc Shores calls the Pinkerton National Detective Agency for assistance; the agency sends Charles Siringo, an undercover specialist known for his unorthodox methods of capturing criminals.

programme.desc: S01 E05 Kit Carson: The Greatest Scout in the West Famed trailblazer and tracker Kit Carson faces the toughest challenge of his life when settler Ann White is captured by an Apache raiding party; now it's a race against time as Carson pursues the Apache in a desperate attempt to save White's life.

programme.title: Freedom on the Range
programme.desc: A celebration of the frontier spirit, highlighting five of the legendary Black cowboys who helped tame the Old West; today, these heroes inspire a new generation of cowboys and ranchers who keep that spirit alive and well.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E06 Bass Reeves: Trailblazing Lawman Escaped slave Bass Reeves heads west to find sanctuary among the Native Americans and becomes the first black Deputy U.S. Marshal west of the Mississippi and hunts down one of the most feared killers in the Indian Territories.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E14 Stagecoach Mary When Mother Amadeus takes ill, former slave Mary Fields travels west to nurse the nun back to health; Mary becomes a fearless mail carrier for the U.S. Postal Service, protecting the mail from bandits and earning the nickname Stagecoach Mary.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S02 E04 The Legend of Nat Love When Black cowboy Nat Love overnights in Deadwood during a cattle drive, he decides to enter a Fourth of July cowboy competition; confident in his roping, riding, and shooting skills, he is eager to test his mettle against the best cowboys around.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E03 Bass Reeves Tracks Belle Starr U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves pursues fugitive Belle Starr, the Bandit Queen, after she flees town with her daughter and outlaw husband.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S03 E22 Closer Than a Brother Closer Than A Brother - Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic lawman Micah Torrence turns in his badge and returns to the bottle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S03 E23 The Lost Treasure of Canyon Town A visit to Micah's old home leads to the uncovering of an old mystery.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E02 Billy the Kid: Birth of an Outlaw Teenage fugitive William Bonney is given a second chance when a kindhearted ranch owner offers him a job; when his new employer is killed in cold blood, Bonney seeks vengeance and transforms into Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E10 The Discoveries of George McJunkin After a devastating storm, ranch foreman George McJunkin discovers ancient bison fossils and flint points unearthed in a riverbank; he sets out to find someone in the scientific community who will acknowledge the importance of his discovery.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E08 William Sublette: King of the Fur Trade In his quest to become king of the fur trade, William Sublette revolutionizes the industry and puts his life on the line in the process; he may risk too much when he rushes to save his comrades in the largest battle of the mountain man era.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E04 Blood Moon The riders try to protect a deaf-mute from a mob which is lynching carriers during a cholera epidemic.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E02 Royal Four-Flush In order to prove that crooks can't be trusted, Bart double-crosses a double-crosser.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E10 Willie Kennard Makes His Mark in History Under siege by gunslingers, the gold mining town of Yankee Hill runs a newspaper advertisement to find a new marshal; former slave and Union soldier Willie Kennard answers the ad, but he faces prejudice and doubt as he works to restore law and order.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E02 Bass Reeves: A Father's Justice After a man murders his wife in a jealous rage and goes on the run, local lawmen are stunned when Marshal Bass Reeves accepts responsibility for bringing the killer to justice, because the murderer is none other than Reeves' own son.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S01 E03 Jim Beckwourth: War Chief of the Crow In an epic tale of adventure, former slave Jim Beckwourth goes West to work as a trapper only to become a battle-hardened war chief of the Crow; when a conflict with mountain men leads to violence, he must choose between the two worlds he loves.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S01 E03 Rustlers Theodore Roosevelt's early efforts to become a cattleman are jeopardized when a neighboring rancher accuses his men of rustling cattle; to save Elkhorn's reputation, Roosevelt and his men must capture the real thief and return the stolen livestock.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E06 The Littlest Cowboy After a gang beats him, Ike becomes depressed about his handicap until a terminally ill boy teaches him a valuable lesson about life.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.desc: A distance of 12.4 miles, 156 corners and a climb of 4,720 feet make up the most fabled mountain in motorsports. Each year competitors make the trek to see if they can conquer the climb up Pikes Peak.

programme.title: Racers Roundtable With Danny Sullivan & Tony Stewart
programme.desc: Kyle Busch, Al Unser Jr & Todd Holbert share untold stories of their family's motorsports legacies.

programme.title: 2026 Icelandic Off-Road
programme.desc: Formula Offroad is by many considered to be the most extreme form of 4x4 off-road racing where drivers compete through steep hills and extreme terrain with specially modified 4x4 trucks.

programme.title: 2026 Formula Drift
programme.desc: When you mix the speed of 1,000 horsepower machines with unmatched style, raw unfiltered sound, exceptional driving precision and lots of tire smoke, you get the spectacle of Formula Drift.

programme.title: 2026 Formula Drift
programme.desc: When you mix the speed of 1,000 horsepower machines with unmatched style, raw unfiltered sound, exceptional driving precision and lots of tire smoke, you get the spectacle of Formula Drift.

programme.title: Racers Unchained
programme.desc: He's an Indy 50 winner, IndyCar champion, and a fan-favorite now working as the team principal of one of the series' most popular teams. Paul Tracy is talking with TK. The two open-wheel racers explore the sport's biggest highs, lows, wins and losses.

programme.title: Racers Roundtable With Danny Sullivan & Tony Stewart
programme.desc: Kyle Busch, Al Unser Jr & Todd Holbert share untold stories of their family's motorsports legacies.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony digs out a rare Mustang that's been hidden under dusty boxes for decades, but the owner has another surprise in store. Then Tony gets a chance to size up a Model A truck at an auction preview before he heads to the famous Spring Carlisle.

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: Dennis travels to the American Muscle Car Museum in Melbourne, Florida, and fires up the Alan Mann GT40.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in a 1970s Datsun 240Z; he digs into the history of these cars and shows some of the ways to deal with the fragile parts and panels.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Sam adds some Lokar Performance flair to the '66 Mustang.

programme.title: Creative Drive
programme.desc: Host Taro Koki explores the world of creativity within the automotive industry.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony helps prep a quirky, rare British TVR for sale and makes a play for one of the most elusive Camaros ever built, the legendary ZL1. When Tony is offered a rust-free '55 Chevy he knows it's too good of a deal to pass up.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: When a client puts out the call for a DeLorean, Tony finds two different contenders: one showroom-clean, the other frozen in time; it's nostalgia versus perfection as Tony helps figure out what's the best route for his client to take.

programme.title: 2026 DAKAR Rally
programme.desc: Part race and part survival contest, just finishing is a victory in itself; spanning 14 days and 5,000 miles, this marathon off-road event is a test of endurance that rewards precision and punishes mistakes.

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: On this episode of MTN Top Outdoors, Jeremiah Voithofer hunts his home state of PA for Turkey and fishes in New York.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: A Colorado Elk hunt from a fresh perspective as Kyle Wieter helps guide his close friend and first time hunter Brad Pfitzner to success.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Taking viewers on hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: President Calvin Coolidge's Model 1894 rifle.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: This week's episode features Let's Fish anchor Andrew Upshaw fishing for Shark at Gulf Shores, AL.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner details why DT crankbaits shine in northern waters, dialing precise depths to trigger big bass.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Mark and David enjoy farewell hunts on Georgia's Tecomate Signature Property, Fox Creek Plantation, before passing stewardship on to the new owner.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: The whole crew is back in Texas hunting whitetails in the October heat.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A busy 4th of July boat party patrol as well as the opening day of firearm deer season and a look behind the counter at the DNR's front office staff.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve's Outdoor Adventures is an adventure big game hunting television show featuring western big game hunting with North America's top outfitters and guides.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Before taking Tracy Cane and Maggie Smith hunting for wild turkey, Steve and Janis serve turkey pâté and tacos.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve, Mark Kenyon and Ryan Callaghan hunt for Coues deer in the mountains of Sonora.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond wild pigs. From giant whitetails in the Midwest to red stag in New Zealand.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: A character-driven outdoor and travel series following Chapo Gringo as he moves through hunting camps, ranches, border towns, and remote places-meeting real people, telling real stories, and keeping things human.

programme.title: Guns & Gear TV
programme.desc: Ruger and Gun Talk launch a special Scout Rifle. Black Hills Ammo, Winchester Supreme Optics, Ross Martin, and Wheeler Tools launch new gear.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: President Calvin Coolidge's Model 1894 rifle.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: The Burtons head to South Boston Speedway for the State Water Heaters Krush 250, presented by Rogers Heating & Cooling, a special late model race benefiting the Ward Burton Wildlife Foundation.

programme.title: Made for the Outdoors
programme.desc: Each week on Made for the Outdoors, hosts Bill Sherck and Alexa Score throw open the factory doors and show how your favorite outdoor gear gets made.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott ventures south to San Diego and teams up with his good buddy, world renowned fishmonger, Tommy Gomes in search of odd creatures from the deep.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Before taking Tracy Cane and Maggie Smith hunting for wild turkey, Steve and Janis serve turkey pâté and tacos.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Sunrise gives life to the valley and animals are on the move.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: We talk about improving the huntability of a property with Kenny Thompson, who manages numerous farms, plants hundreds of acres and creates water holes, funnels, turkey dusting areas and much more.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo

programme.title: Stompin' groundz

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson

programme.desc: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?

programme.title: Undergods
programme.desc: (2020) Dystopian fantasy that weaves together three eerie tales of doomed modernity, framed by the day-to-day of two garbage men who collect corpses from the streets of a ruined estate.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: The Ghost and Mrs Muir
programme.desc: (1947) Supernatural romance starring Rex Harrison as the spirit of a gruff sea captain who haunts widow Gene Tierney, only for her to fall in love with him. Directed by Joseph L Mankiewicz.

programme.title: Destination Gobi
programme.desc: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: (2016) Toby Jones and Catherine Zeta-Jones lead a stellar cast in a reboot of the comedy classic. The hapless Home Guard platoon gets involved with D-Day. But there's a spy in their midst.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: (2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: (1988) Action-thriller with Bruce Willis and Alan Rickman. Can a New York cop free the hostages being held in a skyscraper by an arch villain? Yippee ki-yay... whoops, can't say that here.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: (2017) Fantasy adventure starring Matt Damon and Willem Dafoe. In 11th-century China, Europeans seeking the secret of gunpowder are caught up in a war against alien monsters.

programme.title: Gaia
programme.desc: (2021) Eco-horror. An injured woman is taken by two survivalists to their rainforest hut. But the real threat lurks outside, creeping beneath the forest floor mostly unseen, but familiar...

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Found in Love
programme.desc: Documentary. Three deaf people explain how falling in love helped them discover deaf culture, deaf identity and BSL.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

programme.title: Western Union
programme.desc: (1941) American frontier pioneering western starring Randolph Scott, Robert Young and Dean Jagger as three very different men working to connect east and west by telegraph in the 1860s.

programme.title: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: (1954) Classic 'cowboys and Indians' Western. Gary Cooper, Richard Widmark and Cameron Mitchell star as three rascals hired by Susan Hayward to rescue her husband from Apache territory.

programme.title: To Hell and Back
programme.desc: (1955) Fact-based wartime drama. Audie Murphy, America's most decorated soldier in WWII, plays himself in this dramatic recreation of the valiant heroics that earned him the honours.

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: (2001) Thriller with Owen Wilson. A US Navy flight officer on a NATO reconnaissance mission has to fend for himself when he's shot down by Serb forces in the former Yugoslavia. Violence.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: (2022) Danger-zone action as Tom Cruise returns to the cockpit after 36 years. He's Maverick. He still feels the need for speed. And there's a near-impossible mission to fly. With Jon Hamm.

programme.title: Hit the Road
programme.desc: (2021) Evocative and tender comedy drama tracking the ups and downs and round and rounds of a family on a road trip to get their eldest child out of Iran. In Persian/subs.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam, who presided over "Divorce Court" from 1999-2006 as the first star of the revived version of the show, returns to the courtroom genre with his half-hour series that deals with life and the law. The former Los Angeles-based prosecutor takes on the typical cases that are found on TV court shows. The arbitrator says that her show "will be life because everything we do, it involves the law."

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross
programme.desc: Americans just can't get enough courtroom drama, as is evidenced by yet another addition into the daytime court show fray. Former judge and prosecutor Kevin Ross adjudicates real cases, in which he tries to show litigants alternative ways of dealing with their issues and make them consider the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross
programme.desc: Americans just can't get enough courtroom drama, as is evidenced by yet another addition into the daytime court show fray. Former judge and prosecutor Kevin Ross adjudicates real cases, in which he tries to show litigants alternative ways of dealing with their issues and make them consider the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presided over her self-titled courtroom show from 2000-2008. Now, she returns to the medium with "The Verdict." In the half-hour series, the Atlanta native and former juvenile-court judge rules over small-claims cases brought in front of her. Hatchett's courtroom isn't just about finding someone guilty, though. She also uses her experience dealing with young people and her tough-love approach to help send a message to out-of-control juvenile offenders to try to set them on the right track in their lives.

programme.title: Supreme Justice With Judge Karen
programme.desc: Karen Mills was a county court judge and criminal defense attorney in Florida before turning to TV to preside over her own court shows. In her third effort, "Supreme Justice," Mills tackles small-claims court arbitrations in her compassionate way, to which viewers of her previous shows have grown accustomed. As usual with court shows, cases involve friendships gone bad, money disputes and property damage.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam, who presided over "Divorce Court" from 1999-2006 as the first star of the revived version of the show, returns to the courtroom genre with his half-hour series that deals with life and the law. The former Los Angeles-based prosecutor takes on the typical cases that are found on TV court shows. The arbitrator says that her show "will be life because everything we do, it involves the law."

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presided over her self-titled courtroom show from 2000-2008. Now, she returns to the medium with "The Verdict." In the half-hour series, the Atlanta native and former juvenile-court judge rules over small-claims cases brought in front of her. Hatchett's courtroom isn't just about finding someone guilty, though. She also uses her experience dealing with young people and her tough-love approach to help send a message to out-of-control juvenile offenders to try to set them on the right track in their lives.

programme.title: Supreme Justice With Judge Karen
programme.desc: Karen Mills was a county court judge and criminal defense attorney in Florida before turning to TV to preside over her own court shows. In her third effort, "Supreme Justice," Mills tackles small-claims court arbitrations in her compassionate way, to which viewers of her previous shows have grown accustomed. As usual with court shows, cases involve friendships gone bad, money disputes and property damage.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The Invisible Man: Fantasy espionage series. Nemesis makes enquiries into the international money market and uncovers a dastardly plot involving mind control. S1 Ep2

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: World Championship VII Round of 32 - Final Leg: US robot combat series. The Round of 32 concludes with four dramatic fights and a line-up including fan favourites Minotaur. S7 Ep24

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.

programme.desc: Reply Box 666: Fantasy espionage series. When a French businessman is stabbed to death in a Montego Bay hotel, his real identity as a dangerous GPU agent is revealed. S1 Ep3

programme.desc: Surreal romantic horror comedy film starring Simon Pegg, 2004. When the undead take over London, a loser leaps into action to get to the safest place he knows of - the pub.
